title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 158.95 — 160.00 remains the key level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: AUD/USD
text: RBA hiking rates — AUD carry supported; AUD/USD consolidating above 0.7151.

title: EUR/USD
text: Fed 3.75% (ON HOLD) vs ECB 2% (ON HOLD) — 175bp spread supports EUR/USD; pair holds at 1.1758.

title: AUD/NZD
text: AUD/NZD: retail heavily positioned — 91% SHORT; contrarian reversal risk.

title: USD/JPY vs VIX
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break: corr=+0.628 vs norm=+0.061 (z=+1.46σ) — JPY no longer acting as safe haven; carry position at 158.95 not attracting risk-off unwind.
